gomoku.name: Gomoku
gomoku.description: Place stones to get five in a row. First to connect five wins.
gomoku.hint_place: Your turn — click an intersection to place a stone
gomoku.how_to_play:
Black places the first stone. Players alternate placing one stone per turn on any empty intersection.
The first player to form an unbroken line of five or more stones wins — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally.
There are no captures and no restrictions — simply place and connect.
Think ahead: build your own threats while blocking your opponent's.
If the board fills with no five-in-a-row the game is a draw (very rare).
